allow: PowerShell(git add -A; git commit -F "$env:TEMP\\commit-etapa5.txt"; Remove-Item "$env:TEMP\\commit-etapa5.txt"; git log --oneline)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 40; "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)`nLEN: $\($r.Content.Length\)`n" + \($r.Content -split "`n" | Select-String -Pattern "Delivery Super App|Supabase|<title" | Select-Object -First 5 | Out-String\) } catch { "ERRO: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
